error.page_not_found: The requested page can't be found.
error.unexpected_event: Something unexpected happened on our end.

main_section.intro: is a small personal project developed with two goals in mind:
main_section.visual_format: Moving my completed games log from a notepad to a visual format.
main_section.practice_angular: Putting into practice the new Angular tools that appear with each version.

game_log_section.intro: The game log serves several purposes:
game_log_section.now_playing: Showing the games I am currently playing.
game_log_section.upcoming_games: Showing the games I will be playing shortly.
game_log_section.disclaimer: Each finished game should have an associated rating, which is entirely personal, subjective, and should not be taken as a reference.

ratings_section.title: Ratings
ratings_section.five: Excellent: it has particularly outstanding aspects and is very well executed as a whole.
ratings_section.four: Very good: it hits its main gameplay premise and takes it a step further than expected.
ratings_section.three: Good game: it's entertaining, enjoyable, and has no major flaws, but nothing that makes it stand out either.
ratings_section.two: Mediocre: it barely offers interesting ideas or does so in an erratic or unsuccessful way.
ratings_section.one: Very bad: its main aspects are poorly executed or it has bugs that ruin the experience.
ratings_section.undefined: Pending: its rating was lost for some reason
